message:
Add regression test files for edit encoding and SSE strict compliance

- tests/repro_edit_encoding.rs: Reproduction test for edit tool encoding
  edge cases, validating that non-ASCII content (Unicode, mixed encodings)
  survives the read-modify-write cycle without corruption.
- tests/sse_strict_compliance.rs: SSE parser compliance tests exercising
  BOM stripping (U+FEFF prefix) and bare CR line terminator handling per
  the Server-Sent Events specification. Documents current parser behavior
  for CR-as-line-terminator (spec says CR is valid, parser may or may not
  treat it as line break depending on memchr2 detection mode).

These tests complement the SSE and tool safety changes from earlier commits,
providing standalone regression coverage for edge cases discovered during
conformance testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
